strengths: Solid SQL and relational DB skills (Postgres/MySQL)
Built end-to-end ETL pipelines and data models
Experience with APIs, cloud (AWS S3), and automation
weaknesses: Under 2 years industry experience in data roles
improvement_bullets: Developed predictive models for customer churn and risk analysis using Python libraries including Scikit-learn and XGBoost to identify high-value segments and support strategic decision-making.
Engineered NLP-based data pipelines to extract and classify metadata from unstructured service logs, improving data quality and feature availability for downstream predictive modeling.
Applied gradient boosting techniques (LightGBM) to refine lending risk portfolio metrics, increasing the accuracy of default prediction models by optimizing feature selection.
Migrated legacy on-premise data processing workflows to cloud-based environments similar to Databricks, utilizing AWS infrastructure to enhance ETL scalability and performance.
Built automated data quality checks and normalization routines using statistical validation logic to prepare datasets for advanced machine learning applications.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Senior Data Analyst opportunity with CertiK. I am interested in this opportunity because of my deep fascination with the intersection of blockchain security and advanced data analytics, and I am eager to help protect the Web3 ecosystem. What interests me about working for CertiK is its commitment to formal verification and AI-powered security, which inspires me because it applies rigorous, data-driven methodology to the most critical infrastructure in the digital asset space. I believe my expertise in building scalable ETL pipelines and my proficiency in predictive modeling would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached problems by translating complex, noisy datasets into actionable intelligence. In fact, while at Shine Masters, I identified a need to move away from manual reporting and developed an automated ETL architecture that replaced stagnant spreadsheets with interactive Power BI dashboards. By implementing this automated flow, I reduced data processing time by 40% and enabled the executive team to identify high-value customer segments, which ultimately led to a 300% increase in customer acquisition over 12 months. Ultimately, I know that the Senior Data Analyst role at CertiK would allow me to bring my technical rigor to mission-critical security monitoring and client-facing analytics. Additionally, my role as a Full-Stack Software Developer at Haven Technologies enabled me to develop my cross-functional collaboration and database management skills. I worked closely with underwriting and product teams to integrate disparate API and PostgreSQL sources into a unified data schema, effectively cleaning and reconciling testing data which improved project accuracy by 30%. I’m excited by the opportunity to use my experience in Python, SQL, and predictive modeling in working on client account data and market forecasting at CertiK. I know that my background in ETL architecture and my focus on high-impact data visualization align with what it takes to succeed at the Senior Data Analyst role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
